headline: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Beats Core FFO but Shows Same-Property NOI Decline
summary: Camden Property Trust Q1 earnings beat Core FFO estimates at $1.70, but same-property NOI fell 0.7% amid a softening rental market. Stock flat after recent gains.

headline: Camden Property Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Operating Results
summary: HOUSTON, April 30, 2026--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the "Company") announced today operating results for the three months ended March 31, 2026. Net Income Attributable to Common Shareholders ("EPS"), Funds from Operations ("FFO"), Core Funds from Operations ("Core FFO"), and Core Adjusted Funds from Operations ("Core AFFO") for the three months ended March 31, 2026 are detailed below. A reconciliation of EPS to FFO, Core FFO, and Core AFFO is included in the financial tables accompanying
